description_long: This hotel is a large, multi-story building with a rectangular footprint and a modern architectural design. The facade is dominated by a grid of evenly spaced windows, with a red roof and red-and-white vertical striping on the exterior walls. The lower section features a broad, flat-roofed podium with extensive glass frontage, likely housing the lobby and commercial spaces. The main tower rises above the podium, with a prominent hotel name sign visible on one side. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with some metal elements on the roof and around the windows. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A tall, modern hotel with a red roof, grid-like window pattern, and a broad glass-fronted podium at the base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance area and the full height of the tower, with the podium extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the hotel name signage, the extensive window grid, and the full length of the podium.
description_view_2: Opposite side view reveals the curved edge of the podium and the vertical striping of the tower.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the back facade with a similar window grid and the podium extending to the side.
attribute_hotel_signage: Large white sign with the word 'Sofitel' centered on the upper facade of the main tower.
